title: Spawn Shield
description: This is a plugin that protects the user on spawn!
body:
SpawnShield

A minimal Paper plugin that gives players a short invulnerability "shield" on respawn and shows optional particles.

Features
- Configurable duration and particle options
- Cancels damage while the shield is active
- Commands: /spawnshield reload (permission spawnshield.reload), /spawnshield status

Build
- Java 17
- Run mvn package to build the JAR in target/.

Install
- Drop the generated JAR into your server's plugins/ folder and restart.
